name: Balram Naik
profileSummary: Porika Balram Naik known as Balram Naik is an Indian politician from the state of Telangana belonging to the Indian National Congress party He was a member of the 15th Lok Sabha, Lower House of the Parliament of India. and a member of the 15th and 18th Lok Sabha representing the Mahabubabad constituency. He also served as a Minister of State in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment under prime minister Manmohan Singh from 28 October 2012 until 26 May 2014.
